SessionStart.command: echo '--- GLOBAL CONTEXT ---'; cat ~/.claude/MEMORY.md 2>/dev/null; echo ''; echo '--- PROJECT CONTEXT ---'; cat ./CONTEXT.md 2>/dev/null; cat ./PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null; echo ''; echo '--- GIT STATUS ---'; git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null; git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null; echo ''; echo 'Session context loaded.'
